title: Fatty Crisp Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A crowd-pleasing Brazilian dish featuring lemongrass stalks and salt-baked chicken, this recipe is a whole30-friendly delight that is both fatty and crisp. It is perfect for any occasion and can be served as an appetizer or main course.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, paprika, and cayenne pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken and lemongrass pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the chicken is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
